---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new idea or functional improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the missing capability is (e.g., "I can't see the sentiment trend over time").

### Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Describe alternatives you've considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### How does this impact the Tech Stack?
- [ ] Changes in `Morlana_frontend` (UI/UX)
- [ ] Changes in `Morlana_backend` (API/Logic)
- [ ] Changes in `Qdrant` (Schema/Embedding changes)

### Additional context
Add any mockups or references to existing Reddit analysis tools if applicable.
